description_long: This object represents a compact, modern internet cafe structure with a rectangular main body and a rounded front section. The exterior is predominantly gray with blue-tinted window panels and several raised, arch-like structural elements on the roof. The front area features a control console or reception desk with various equipment, possibly for check-in or customer service, and a spherical decorative element. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple computer stations arranged in rows, each with distinct colored accents, likely indicating different user zones. The overall design is functional and streamlined, with minimal decorative features and a focus on utility. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal and glass, with some plastic components for equipment and seating.
description: A compact, modern internet cafe with a gray exterior, blue window panels, and visible rows of computer stations inside. The design features arch-like roof supports and a rounded front reception area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded front reception area, blue window panels, and arch-like roof supports.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the roof arches and the back entrances or exits.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rows of computer stations and the open layout of the main floor.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the reception desk, spherical decorative element, and entryway details.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Multiple computer stations are visible from the top and side views, arranged in rows with colored accents indicating different zones.
